title: euphrasia gibbsiae subsp. subglabrifolia
intro: Euphrasia gibbsiae subsp. subglabrifolia is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various eye problems such as conjunctivitis, cataracts, and glaucoma due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Euphrasia gibbsiae subsp. subglabrifolia is often used in eye drops, ointments, and tea infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
